feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Concur
feed.subtitle: SAP Concur Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP concur employee connected list - Error saving connected list: FieldInUse
entry.content:
Hello,

In an implementation environnement, I modified a connected list in the employee form. When I tried to roll back in modifiying it again I received this error message: Error saving Connected List: FieldInUse

I have disconnected all the form, but I still can't change any field of the connected list.

ps: The change I tried to make was to add or remove a field

entry.title: Concur Integration Approach - Best Practice
entry.content:
Hello everyone,


We are implementing Concur cloud solutions implementation, which involves integrating SAP ECC on premise. In our landscape, we're also utilizing the CI/CPI middleware. I'd like to address a question we're currently facing regarding our chosen integration method within ICS.
ICS offers two integration options: one through middleware and the other is a direct approach. During our assessment, we've identified that while some interfaces can seamlessly utilize ICS, others such as Employee Data, Payroll, Exchange rates, etc., might require either a flat file or a Concur API approach outside ICS. I have two specific questions that I'd like to address: What would be the most suitable approach, given that not all interfaces are compatible with the ICS method? Should we consider employing CPI (Cloud Platform Integration) for all interfaces, even if it acts as a pass-through for ICS interfaces? This approach could potentially provide encryption and SFTP capabilities for certain interfaces. Please provide insights into the factors or reasons and any references for best practices that support this choice. For those interfaces that won't utilize the ICS add-on, would it be advisable to opt for the Concur API approach by using custom integration flows or standard iFlows wherever they are available? It's important to note that we are not inclined towards the flat file approach. Your input on these matters would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: ​Integrating Event Mesh with CONCUR API
entry.content:
Integrating Event Mesh with CONCUR API for real-time data replication/updates to HANA through SAP CPI

Hi experts,

I am currently exploring a solution in which I wish to initiate a SAP CPI flow every time there's a modification (be it creation, update, or deletion) to an entry in the EXPENSE/ENTRIES entity of CONCUR, using event mesh. My ultimate goal is to replicate these changes to a HANA database in real-time.

However, I am uncertain if CONCUR's API is compatible with or supports event mesh.

Has anyone had experience or insights on integrating event mesh with CONCUR and SAP CPI? Your feedback would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Théo

entry.title: SAP Concur transmission of sensitive data
entry.content:
Could someone please tell me if the transmission of sensitive data is done over a secure channel, or TLS/SSL enabled email and password protected, or are we based communications with transport encryption?

I can't seem to find this information.

Thanks

entry.title: Using data for testing purposes
entry.content: Can someone please confirm that "live" data and information will not be used for test purposes? And that any data and information that is used for test purposes will be anonymized, scrambled or otherwise rendered in such a way that no live data or information can be reconstructed from that used for test purposes?

entry.title: Is user data copied
entry.content: Can someone please confirm that client information is not copied as far as is necessary for providing agreed service to us?

entry.title: two factor authentication in concur?
entry.content: Does Concur support 2FA?

entry.title: Data and information recovery
entry.content: Does Concur have a process in place for recovering data? and an emergency recovery plan?

entry.title: Is client data used for testing
entry.content: Does Concur use any client data or information for internal development or testing purposes? Just trying to understand if our company, as a customer, should be concerned about this. Thanks

entry.title: How is data used
entry.content: Will client data be copied and used for any purpose by SAP Concur other than providing a service to said client? Thanks

entry.title: SAP Concur User API not working
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I'm trying to fetch users using this 2 APIs:

1. https://<tenant-name>/api/v3.0/common/users

2. https://<tenant-name>/api/user/v1.0/user

After hitting the above url, I'm getting this Error:

{ "Error": { "Message": "Forbidden Request", "Server-Time": "2023-10-27T05:25:56", "Id": "A33333E7-***********************" }}Can anyone tell me whether this APIs are still supported in SAP Concur or this are deprecated API's?Regards'Dabblu

entry.title: User is not authorized to access this resource. Please assign applicable scopes to this user
entry.content:
Hi, when trying to hit the API from postman getting below error. Everything looks good in headers and authorization part, what could have gone wrong with API?

API Reference- https://www.concursolutions.com/api/user/v1.0

Postman Body-

{

"Error": { "Message": "Forbidden Request", "Server-Time": "2023-10-30T21:49:24", "Id": "018883A0-68AC-4BCA-9AA7-4A075FF8E2C1" }}

entry.title: Add entries into CTE_D_ACC_ATTR table
entry.content:
Hello There,

I got a requirement to SPLIT the expenses into SAP ECC.
The field that comes with the Tax Id vendor is MerchantTaxID, whoever, this field does not exist into the table CTE_D_ACC_ATTR.

Are there any way to insert an additional line into this master data table?

In addition, are there any code examples for the SPLIT badi?

Thanks, and best regards,

Oscar

entry.title: Debug Concur BADI
entry.content:
I want to debug Concur BADI for expense Report. I have JSON file in SAP.

Please help

Regards

entry.title: SAP Concur - My expense reports and history is deleted from my account. Any idea why?
entry.content:
Not sure what's going on with my account, but I had spent a while putting together a bunch of mobile phone reports together from the past 2 years (which probably needs to be approved by finance).

In any case, I had done reports for this current year and it got auto approved.

The weird part is that neither of these reports are located or mentioned inside of my concur account, and I had no email to confirm that my last expense report went through either.

Any idea whats happening?

entry.title: Ryanair Travel Agreement with SAP Concur
entry.content:
Fasten your seatbelts for a juicy one! I saw today that Ryanair is partnering with SAP Concur to offer affordable corporate travel: Ryanair Signs 'Groundbreaking' Corporate Travel Agreement.

So Ryanair, the budget airline we all love (or love to hate) just hooked up with SAP Concur...what does this mean for the future of business travel?

entry.title: Different values for same field in SE16 and SE16N
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a issue where I am getting different values for same table data.

I am displaying data in BSEG table.

for field WBS-Element (PROJK), it is displaying converted value for that WBS element in SE16, but in SE16N for the Document Number is is displaying another data which is unconverted. Now, I want same data in both of these tcodes (either converted or unconverted).

How can I solve this ? Help appreciated !

entry.title: Integration of SAP Community and SAP Concur Community
entry.content:
Hi,

As part of Migrating all the SAP Concur Sites under SAP tree. Is their any plan to move the SAP Concur Community site as well under SAP Community?

Regards

Jyotesh

entry.title: Need help integrating test systems i.e. SAP Concur to SuccessFactors.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Need help integrating test systems i.e. SAP Concur to SuccessFactors. Both are Test clients and we want to integrate via API / middleware, as SFTP is not available for test systems. 

Pls guide.

Br,

Kumar Dave

 API Management, API

entry.title: how to download files from URL to a folder using SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Everyone.

I have a requirement to retrieve the images from Concur. When I make the API call, it returns the URL of the pdf image which is valid for 15 mins. I need to store this to a folder for further processing.

As a POC, When I call this URL using request reply and send it to a mail, I am receiving white blank pdf attachments.Can you please advise ?

An update: When I get response after calling the URL, I have applied MIME Multipart encoder and If I take that base64 string and use online tool(https://base64.guru/converter/decode/pdf)  to decode it to PDF, it looks good.

How do I extract the base64 string and decode it to PDF in CPI ?

 

Thanks,
Varun
